name: @openwop/openwop-host-postgres
description: Reference Postgres-backed OpenWOP host. PARTIAL as of 2026-05-11 — basic run lifecycle + audit-log integrity profile (openwop-audit-log-integrity). interrupts, webhooks, observability ports are deferred to follow-up sessions per module. Uses pglite (Postgres-on-WASM) for in-process tests; production deployers point OPENWOP_PG_DSN at a real Postgres.

scripts.test: tsx test/lifecycle.test.ts && tsx test/audit-tamper.test.ts && tsx test/audit-checkpoint-export.test.ts && tsx test/pause-resume.test.ts && tsx test/interrupts.test.ts && tsx test/webhooks.test.ts && tsx test/sse.test.ts && tsx test/review-fixes.test.ts && tsx test/claim.test.ts && tsx test/backpressure.test.ts && tsx test/agent-events.test.ts && tsx test/ai-policy.test.ts && tsx test/byok-roundtrip.test.ts && tsx test/byok-cross-provider.test.ts && tsx test/http-client.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-client.test.ts && tsx test/memory-adapter.test.ts && tsx test/memory-compaction.test.ts && tsx test/mtls.test.ts && tsx test/multi-region-idempotency.test.ts && tsx test/multi-region-partition.test.ts && tsx test/cross-engine-append.test.ts && tsx test/oauth2-oidc.test.ts && tsx test/pack-consumer.test.ts && tsx test/reasoning-event-emission.test.ts && tsx test/mock-agent.test.ts && tsx test/cost-attribution.test.ts && tsx test/model-capability-insufficient.test.ts && tsx test/model-capability-gate-seam.test.ts && npm run test:auth-rotation
